findings.explanation: Upstream urn:li:dataset:(urn:li:dataPlatform:demo,raw_transactions,PROD) changed schema (customer_id:int->string); urn:li:mlFeatureTable:(urn:li:dataPlatform:demo,user_risk_features) has not recorded a recomputation after that change.
findings.remediation: Recompute the downstream feature table after validating the upstream schema change, then update the expected schema metadata.
findings.title: Upstream schema changed after feature computation

findings.explanation: urn:li:dataset:(urn:li:dataPlatform:demo,raw_transactions,PROD) exposes sensitive field evidence in the scanned model lineage and no approved exception was found.
findings.remediation: Remove the sensitive field from the feature set or attach an approved PII exception in DataHub before production use.
findings.title: PII flows into model lineage without an approved exception

findings.explanation: urn:li:mlFeatureTable:(urn:li:dataPlatform:demo,user_risk_features) exposes sensitive field evidence in the scanned model lineage and no approved exception was found.
findings.remediation: Remove the sensitive field from the feature set or attach an approved PII exception in DataHub before production use.
findings.title: PII flows into model lineage without an approved exception

findings.explanation: urn:li:dataset:(urn:li:dataPlatform:demo,raw_transactions,PROD) was last refreshed 129.8 hours before the scan, exceeding its 24.0 hour cadence.
findings.remediation: Human review required: refresh the upstream dataset or update the declared cadence if the SLA has changed.
findings.title: Upstream dataset is stale for its declared cadence

findings.explanation: urn:li:mlFeatureTable:(urn:li:dataPlatform:demo,user_risk_features) appears in the scanned lineage path but has no DataHub owner.
findings.remediation: Assign a DataHub owner for this lineage entity.
findings.title: Lineage entity has no registered owner

findings.explanation: urn:li:dataset:(urn:li:dataPlatform:demo,raw_transactions,PROD) contains feature evidence that may be known only after the prediction label is determined.
findings.remediation: Human review required: confirm the feature is available at prediction time or remove it from model training.
findings.title: Feature may use post-outcome information

findings.explanation: urn:li:mlFeature:(user_risk_features,chargeback_resolved_at) contains feature evidence that may be known only after the prediction label is determined.
findings.remediation: Human review required: confirm the feature is available at prediction time or remove it from model training.
findings.title: Feature may use post-outcome information
